creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: roam->portmgr

Actually, I can use this PR for the repo-copy request itself :) 

To the Ports Management Team: this is a request to repo-copy the 
ports/security/stunnel/files/stunnel.sh file to 
ports/security/stunnel/files/stunnel.in so that USE_RC_SUBR=stunnel 
works properly, and the stunnel port gets a "real" startup script. 
After the repo-copy is done, I'll take care of handling the other 
changes in the port's files. 

Thanks in advance!
